title: Movie Rating
input_format: Table: Movies (movie_id, title). Table: Users (user_id, name). Table: MovieRating (movie_id, user_id, rating, created_at).
output_format: Result with column 'results' — first row: user who rated most movies (alphabetically first if tie), second row: movie with highest avg rating in Feb 2020 (alphabetically first if tie)
example_input:
Table: Movies
| movie_id | title    |
| 1        | Avengers |
| 2        | Frozen   |
| 3        | Joker    |
constraints:
- (movie_id, user_id) is the primary key of MovieRating
- movie_id references Movies
- user_id references Users
